narrative:
Manchester United Township (precinct in Adams County) has 984 registered voters, with 63.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.9 percentage points.
